ns0:entry.ns0:title: Devolutions/UniGetUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Devolutions/UniGetUI
Language: c%23
UniGetUI: The Graphical Interface for your package managers. Could be terribly described as a package manager manager to manage your package managers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
Language: c%23
AI Skills, MCP Tools, and CLI for Unity Engine. Full AI develop and test loop. Use cli for quick setup. Efficient token usage, advanced tools. Any C# method may be turned into a tool by a single line. Works with Claude Code, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor and any other absolutely for free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LavaGang/MelonLoader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LavaGang/MelonLoader
Language: c%23
The World's First Universal Mod Loader for Unity Games compatible with both Il2Cpp and Mono

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MudBlazor/MudBlazor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MudBlazor/MudBlazor
Language: c%23
Blazor Component Library based on Material Design principles. Do more with Blazor, utilizing CSS and keeping JavaScript to a bare minimum.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NickvisionApps/Parabolic
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NickvisionApps/Parabolic
Language: c%23
Download web video and audio

A real WinUI desktop cleaner with terminal control and multi-database support

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/efcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/efcore
Language: c%23
EF Core is a modern object-database mapper for .NET. It supports LINQ queries, change tracking, updates, and schema migrations.

URL: https://github.com/microsoft/semantic-kernel

ns0:entry.ns0:title: new-frontiers-14/frontier-station-14
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/new-frontiers-14/frontier-station-14
Language: c%23
A 2D multiplayer sandbox survival game set in space. Based off from the cult-classic Space Station 13/14.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: seerge/g-helper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/seerge/g-helper
Language: c%23
Lightweight Armoury Crate alternative for Asus laptops with nearly the same functionality. Works with ROG Zephyrus, Flow, TUF, Strix, Scar, ProArt, Vivobook, Zenbook, Expertbook, ROG Ally, and many more.
